case_title: SECURITY CREDIT SERVICES LLC VS. JEFFREY WALSH et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SECURITY CREDIT SERVICES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALSH, JEFFREY $11,448.51 PRINCIPAL, $3,017.39 INTEREST, $378.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,843.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SECURITY CREDIT SERVICES LLC
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033; WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEE; CALCULATION OF INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECURITY CREDIT SERVICES LLC
DECLARATION RE: COPY IN LIEU OF ORIGINAL PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA EVIDENCE CODE 1550 & 1551 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECURITY CREDIT SERVICES LLC
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF TESTIMONY CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECURITY CREDIT SERVICES LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECURITY CREDIT SERVICES LLC SERVED NOV-14-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WALSH, JEFFREY

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECURITY CREDIT SERVICES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WALSH, JEFFREY DOES 1 THROUGH 30, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-14-2009
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $378.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WALSH, JEFFREY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 30, INCLUSIVE
